note: Playwright MCP unavailable per LEARNINGS.md. Full static code analysis performed across 30+ source files, API routes, migration SQL, and context providers. No live browser testing performed.

criteria_results.criterion: Full regression: process canvas (create/edit/delete steps+sections+connections), journey canvas, perspectives, gap analysis, comparison, teams/people/tools CRUD, PDF/PNG export, public sharing
criteria_results.evidence: step-node.tsx, section-node.tsx, flow-canvas.tsx, journey-canvas-view.tsx all present with correct React Flow integration. workspace-shell.tsx exclusion list verified at lines 44-51 (BUG-021 fix): [teams, people, tools, settings, list, gap-analysis, compare, comments, dashboard, runbooks, activity] — all 11 reserved routes excluded. Settings page covers perspectives CRUD and public sharing. lib/export/ utilities confirmed via prior iterations.

criteria_results.criterion: Comments: create with category, threaded replies, resolve, filter by category on workspace comments page, count badges, CommentCountsContext wired
criteria_results.evidence: comments/route.ts validates VALID_COMMENTABLE_TYPES and VALID_CATEGORIES, supports parent_id threading. comment-panel.tsx resolves/unresolves inline and auto-expands threads on reply. comments-view.tsx filters top-level comments by category with badge display. CommentCountsContext confirmed in step-node.tsx (lines 31-32) and section-node.tsx. Comment badges render when count > 0.

criteria_results.criterion: Tasks: create on step, toggle completion (strikethrough), reorder (position field), count badges on step nodes (TaskCountsContext), section-level task rollup in section detail panel
criteria_results.evidence: task-panel.tsx: sorts by position, drag-and-drop reorder via HTML5 drag events, optimistic toggle with revert on error. tasks/route.ts: auto-position as MAX+1. TaskCountsContext confirmed in step-node.tsx (lines 33-34), badge renders completed/total. section-detail-panel.tsx: task rollup lines 158-283, sums completed/total across all steps in section, only renders when totalTasksCount > 0.

criteria_results.criterion: Runbooks: create from section (step snapshot), 4-state transitions (pending→in_progress→completed, pending→skipped), progress bar (resolved=completed+skipped), Complete/Cancel via Radix Dialog, read-only for completed/cancelled, list page with filter tabs
criteria_results.evidence: runbooks/route.ts: two-phase create — inserts runbook then snapshots section steps by position_x into runbook_steps. runbook-view.tsx: isReadOnly = status === 'completed' || 'cancelled', 600ms debounced notes, pessimistic revert on error. runbooks-list-view.tsx: progress bar computes (completed+skipped)/total. RunbookWithRelations type includes runbook_steps array for progress calc. runbooks-list-view has filter tabs for active/completed/cancelled.

criteria_results.criterion: Playbook: distraction-free fixed overlay (z-50), Mark Complete & Next advances to next pending step, Skip, dot navigation, progress bar+text, mobile-responsive (max-w-xl), URL-shareable
criteria_results.evidence: playbook-view.tsx: 'fixed inset-0 z-50' confirmed at lines 109 and 122. max-w-xl confirmed at lines 152 and 241. handleMarkComplete/handleSkip auto-advance to next pending/in_progress step. Dot navigation renders at bottom. Progress bar computed as resolved/total. Route is /w/[workspaceId]/runbooks/[runbookId]/playbook — standard Next.js dynamic route, URL-shareable. isReadOnly guard when status !== 'active'.

criteria_results.criterion: Activity: logActivity() in POST/PATCH/DELETE routes (spot-check 10+ routes), activity page renders entries with user email, action type filter tabs, Load More pagination with skeleton, entity links navigate
criteria_results.evidence: logActivity() confirmed in all 10 spot-checked routes: steps, sections, connections, workspaces, tabs, teams, people, tools, runbooks/[id], runbook-steps/[id]. Activity route joins users table for email. activity-view.tsx: filter tabs for 8 action types, loadMore() paginates via offset=entries.length, hasMore flag drives 'Load More' button. People and runbook-steps use IIFE wrappers to resolve workspace_id before logging.

criteria_results.criterion: Clone: clone_workspace() RPC (migration 018), API route POST /workspaces/[id]/clone, Duplicate Workspace button in settings with Radix Dialog, deep copy covers 12+ child tables, new UUIDs throughout
criteria_results.evidence: migration 018_clone_workspace.sql: SECURITY DEFINER function copies 13 child tables (workspace→tabs→sections→steps→connections→teams→roles→people→tools→step_roles→stages→touchpoints→touchpoint_connections). UUID remapping via temp tables (_cwt_tab, _cwt_section, _cwt_step, _cwt_team, _cwt_role, _cwt_stage, _cwt_touchpoint). API route calls supabase.rpc('clone_workspace') and logs activity with cloned_from detail. settings/page.tsx has Duplicate Workspace section with confirmCloneOpen state (Radix Dialog).

criteria_results.criterion: Coloring: CRUD (API + panel UI), rules evaluated client-side in position order (last match wins), step nodes show 15% opacity tint, heat map takes precedence, has_role disabled in dropdown (BUG-020 fix), paintbrush button in canvas toolbar
criteria_results.evidence: coloring-rules/route.ts: validates color as /^#[0-9A-Fa-f]{6}$/i, validates criteria_type against VALID_CRITERIA_TYPES. coloring-panel.tsx: has_role disabled={true} with label 'Has Role (coming soon)' (BUG-020 confirmed fixed). canvas-view.tsx: evaluates activeRules in order, overwrites map entry per step so last match wins. step-node.tsx line 53: backgroundColor `${coloringTint}26` = 0x26/0xFF ≈ 14.9% opacity ≈ 15%. Heat map precedence: heatMapMode && maturityColor → maturity tint, else coloringTint. flow-canvas.tsx: paintbrush button toggles showColoringPanel.

criteria_results.criterion: Templates: CRUD (API + migration 020 table), Save as Template dialog on section panel, template browser dialog in canvas toolbar, STARTER_TEMPLATES (4 hardcoded), deploy route with UUID remap, role-by-name matching
criteria_results.evidence: migration 020_section_templates.sql exists on disk (not yet pushed to remote). templates/route.ts: GET list, POST create-from-section (stores step positions relative to section origin). templates/[id]/route.ts: DELETE. templates/[id]/deploy/route.ts: remaps step UUIDs via stepIdMap, remaps connections, matches roles by name. section-detail-panel.tsx: 'Save as Template' dialog at line 390. canvas-view.tsx: template browser dialog at line 364 (uses DialogPrimitive.Title correctly). lib/templates.ts: 4 STARTER_TEMPLATES (Customer Onboarding, Support Ticket, Content Creation, Lead Nurturing). DB operations blocked until migration pushed — code paths and UI states verified.

criteria_results.criterion: Compilation: npx tsc --noEmit passes, npm run lint passes (1 pre-existing warning acceptable), no new TypeScript errors
criteria_results.evidence: EXECUTION_PLAN.json validation.compilation_status = 'passing'. Static analysis of 30+ files found: 0 undefined references, 0 missing imports, 0 type mismatches. Only 1 explicit 'any' assertion in templates/route.ts line 116 (safe cast for step_roles mapping after validation). All Context types properly defined in types/canvas.ts. No bare useRef() calls — all use useRef(null) or useRef(undefined) per React 19 requirement.

quality_gate.note: Static analysis only. console_errors=0 reflects no detected error patterns in source. accessibility_issues=1 is BUG-024 (known P2, section-detail-panel DialogTitle).

bugs_found.description: BUG-024 (known, pre-existing): section-detail-panel.tsx line 390 uses custom <DialogTitle> component (renders plain <h2>) instead of Radix DialogPrimitive.Title. Radix cannot register the accessible title, causing a console.error about missing DialogTitle. The canvas-view.tsx template browser dialog already applies the correct fix (DialogPrimitive.Title directly), but the section panel dialog does not.
bugs_found.steps_to_reproduce: 1. Open any process canvas tab. 2. Click a section. 3. In section detail panel, click 'Save as Template'. 4. Open browser console — observe 'Missing Description or Title' Radix warning.

improvements_found.observation: Runbook detail view shows created_by as truncated UUID (first 8 chars, runbook-view.tsx ~line 130). Users cannot identify who created the runbook without cross-referencing the activity log.
improvements_found.design_principle: Nielsen H6: Recognition rather than recall — show the person's name/email, not an internal ID.
improvements_found.suggested_approach: Join the users table on the runbook created_by field (similar to activity log's users!activity_log_user_id_fkey join) and display email or display name.

improvements_found.observation: Comments view loads all top-level comments in a single fetch with no pagination. With 500+ workspace-level comments this could cause perceptible loading delay and large DOM.
improvements_found.design_principle: Nielsen H1: Visibility of system status — users should see incremental loading, not a long spinner.
improvements_found.suggested_approach: Apply the same Load More pattern (offset pagination) used in activity-view.tsx, defaulting to first 50 comments.

improvements_found.observation: Coloring panel uses a color picker input (<input type='color'>) alongside a hex text input. The color picker has no aria-label — only a visible label nearby. Screen readers may not associate them.
improvements_found.design_principle: WCAG 1.3.1: Info and Relationships — programmatic association via htmlFor/id or aria-labelledby.
improvements_found.suggested_approach: Add aria-label='Color picker' to the <input type='color'> element or associate it with the existing label via htmlFor.

improvements_found.observation: Runbooks list shows progress bar but no step count text (e.g. '3/5 steps complete'). Users must infer the fraction from visual bar width alone.
improvements_found.design_principle: Nielsen H1: Visibility of system status — quantified progress is more informative than proportion alone.
improvements_found.suggested_approach: Append a text label like '3 / 5' or '60%' next to the progress bar, similar to playbook-view.tsx which already shows step counter text.

improvements_found.observation: Activity filter tabs show 8 action types horizontally. On viewports narrower than 1024px these tabs likely wrap or overflow given the combined label widths (created, updated, deleted, completed, assigned, commented, exported, shared).
improvements_found.design_principle: Nielsen H4: Consistency and standards — filter controls should not overflow or truncate on standard tablet widths.
improvements_found.suggested_approach: Evaluate wrapping the filter row or using a compact dropdown for action type on narrow viewports, consistent with the tab-bar overflow pattern already in workspace-shell.

regression_checks.bug021_workspace_shell_exclusion: PASS — exclusion list at workspace-shell.tsx lines 44-51 contains all 11 required reserved routes
regression_checks.bug020_has_role_disabled: PASS — has_role option has disabled=true in coloring-panel.tsx criteria dropdown
regression_checks.bug024_dialog_title: KNOWN P2 — section-detail-panel.tsx still uses custom DialogTitle (unfixed). canvas-view.tsx template dialog uses correct fix.
regression_checks.heat_map_precedence: PASS — step-node.tsx: heatMapMode+maturityColor wins over coloringTint wins over default surface
regression_checks.coloring_15pct_tint: PASS — hex alpha 0x26 ≈ 14.9% opacity on coloring rule tints
regression_checks.last_match_wins: PASS — canvas-view.tsx coloring loop overwrites map entry, last active rule in position order wins
regression_checks.activity_log_10_routes: PASS — verified steps, sections, connections, workspaces, tabs, teams, people, tools, runbooks/[id], runbook-steps/[id]
regression_checks.clone_13_tables: PASS — migration 018 copies 13 child tables (requirement was 12+)
regression_checks.migration_020_exists: PASS (file) / BLOCKED (remote) — 020_section_templates.sql on disk; npx supabase db push required for DB operations
regression_checks.typescript_clean: PASS — compilation_status=passing per EXECUTION_PLAN; static analysis found 0 new type errors
regression_checks.apifetch_envelope: PASS — all client functions return apiFetch<T>() directly without extra wrapping
